name: shopify-draft-proxy-gleam-shim
description: TS shim re-exporting the Gleam-port public API. Mirrors the surface area of the top-level shopify-draft-proxy package so consumers can drop the Gleam build in once domain coverage is complete.

scripts.dev: cd .. && gleam build --target javascript && cd js && tsx watch src/server.ts
scripts.build: cd .. && gleam build --target javascript && cd js && tsc -p .
scripts.test: cd .. && gleam build --target javascript && cd js && vitest run
